llm_verdict.message: {"approved": true, "review_approved": true, "review_feedback": "The remediation plan correctly ensures SELinux is set to enforcing mode by updating /etc/selinux/config and applying setenforce 1, addressing the vulnerability.", "review_concerns": [], "review_suggested_improvements": [], "review_security_score": 10, "qa_safe": true, "qa_verdict_reason": "The remediation updates /etc/selinux/config to enforce SELinux and runs setenforce 1 to switch current mode to enforcing without reboot.
